decks.notes: The deck focuses on using land-based ramp and mana acceleration cards paired with Amulet of Vigor to quickly ramp into powerful threats like Primeval Titan and Cultivator Colossus. By utilizing cards like Scapeshift and Urza's Saga, the deck can quickly assemble a powerful board state to overwhelm opponents. The inclusion of Aftermath Analyst and Malevolent Rumble provides additional disruption and removal options, while cards like Boesiju, Who Endures can protect key combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces to generate overwhelming advantage and close out the game.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with cheap artifacts and using them to deal damage efficiently. It includes cards that can generate mana, cheap artifacts for quick deployment, and disruptive elements like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt to disrupt opponent's strategies. Emry, Lurker of the Loch enables card recursion and board recovery, while Arcbound Ravager provides a powerful finisher. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggro and affinity strategies, utilizing the synergy between artifacts and artifact-centric cards to create a fast and powerful win condition.

This combo-reanimator deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with key creatures such as Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour. By utilizing Unearth and Persist to bring back these creatures from the graveyard, the deck can overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats early in the game. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's game plan and ensure the combo pieces can come together smoothly.

The deck focuses on generating large amounts of mana quickly using cards like Ruby Medallion, Manamorphose, and Pyretic Ritual to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Grapeshot. It also utilizes flashback spells like Past in Flames to reuse spells from the graveyard and create a storm of spells to overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards like Reckless Impulse and Wish to dig for key pieces of the combo. The land base includes fetch lands like Bloodstained Mire and Scalding Tarn to ensure consistent mana fixing while supporting the combo strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and artifact creatures to quickly overrun the opponent with aggressive plays. By generating mana through Mox Opal and utilizing cards like Metallic Rebuke to control the board, the deck aims to create a fast clock for the opponent. Cards like Urza's Saga and Mishra's Bauble provide additional value and card advantage, while cards like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary help to pump up the team and push for lethal damage. The deck's synergy, speed, and resilience make it a force to be reckoned with in the Modern format.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast-paced aggression, utilizing creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to apply pressure on the opponent. Supporting cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thraben Charm provide additional versatility and disruption. The deck also includes some control elements with Arena of Glory and Blood Moon to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, aiming to win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, while utilizing cards like Ocelot Pride and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to boost their power. The deck also includes support cards like Goblin Bombardment and Arena of Glory to control the battlefield. Blood Moon can disrupt opponents relying on non-basic lands, while cards like Voice of Victory and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional win conditions. Overall, this deck aims to quickly pressure the opponent and finish the game before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources through land destruction and removal spells, while generating card advantage and board presence through the use of creatures and spells that benefit from the destruction of lands. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's mana base and prevent them from developing their board, while steadily advancing your own game plan and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and removal spells. This deck aims to dominate the battlefield and limit the opponent's options to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to generate mana and control the board, while also using powerful card draw and disruption spells to maintain advantage. Emry, Urza's Saga, and Tamiyo are key pieces in the deck, allowing for recursion of artifacts and generating additional value. The inclusion of Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer provide aggressive threats, while cards like Metallic Rebuke and Claws of Gix offer interaction with the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of speed, resilience, and disruption, ultimately leading to a victorious outcome.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast and aggressive strategy, using efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Guide of Souls to generate additional value from creature attacks. The deck also includes some control elements like Path to Exile and Thraben Charm to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Voice of Victory, Ocelot Pride, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Support spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm help control the board and push damage through. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide additional power and resilience. The deck also includes some disruption with Goblin Bombardment and Ranger-Captain of Eos. Arena of Glory and Seasoned Pyromancer help generate value and card advantage. The deck aims to close out games quickly with a mix of combat damage and burn spells.

This deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with artifacts to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and synergy. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to accelerate mana production and draw cards, along with creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary to apply pressure, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while presenting a fast clock. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager provide additional utility and flexibility, making it a versatile and adaptable deck that can adapt to different situations.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, supported by burn spells like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge to control the board. The deck also includes powerful finishers such as Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to seal the deal. The inclusion of cards like Arena of Glory and Thraben Charm helps to buff and protect your creatures, while cards like Ocelot Pride and Guide of Souls provide additional value and card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggressive strategy.

This Boros Ponza Control deck focuses on disrupting opponent's mana base with land destruction spells like Cleansing Wildfire and Field of Ruin, while utilizing powerful spells like Erode and Galvanic Discharge to control the game. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Price of Freedom to close out the game quickly. With a mix of removal spells like Path to Exile and board wipes like Wrath of the Skies, this deck aims to control the pace of the game and secure victory through overwhelming board presence.

The main concept of this Modern Rakdos Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively play creatures and burn spells to reduce the opponent's life total as fast as possible. By utilizing cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Detective's Phoenix, and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Cori-Steel Cutter and Fear of Missing Out. The deck also includes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Street Wraith to cycle through the deck quickly and maintain card advantage. Overall, the deck is focused on fast-paced, aggressive play to overwhelm and defeat the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the dredge mechanic to fill the graveyard with key cards such as Arclight Phoenix and Creeping Chill, while also cycling through the deck quickly with cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry. By constantly dumping cards into the graveyard and bringing back powerful creatures like Arclight Phoenix, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive combo strategy. Additionally, the deck includes some control elements with cards like Flame Jab and Conflagrate to deal with threats and maintain board presence.
